macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds after reports of U.S.-Iran deal progress
items.summary: Bitcoin fell to about $74,250 before rebounding toward $77,000 after market sentiment improved on reports that a U.S.-Iran agreement was largely negotiated. The move helped crypto markets recover roughly $75 billion in total market capitalization.

items.title: Crypto markets broadly weaken as Bitcoin slips below recent highs
items.summary: Broader cryptocurrency markets were mostly lower, with Bitcoin around $76,617 and Ethereum near $2,094 in one market snapshot. Major altcoins also traded lower, reflecting a risk-off move across the sector.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins token flows to exchanges raise market questions
items.summary: Large volumes of PENGU tokens reportedly moved from the project's deployment address to centralized exchanges, sparking concern among traders during a strong market rally. The transfers have drawn attention because large exchange inflows can sometimes precede selling pressure.

items.title: CoinMarketCal highlights several project catalysts, including WILD, FIL and RLB
items.summary: Recent notable events listed by CoinMarketCal include Wilder World voting on an ETH treasury swap, Filecoin's Snowflake x Akave storage-related development, and Rollbit Coin's 60% supply burn. These project updates could influence trading sentiment and token prices.

items.title: Binance to list DePHY Network amid airdrop-linked launch
items.summary: CoinMarketCal reported that Binance planned to list DePHY Network (PHY) for USDT trading, with the event tied to an airdrop. Exchange listings often trigger elevated volatility as a token gains broader access to traders.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Riot addresses Vanguard anti-cheat and DMA cheat hardware claims in Valorant
items.summary: Riot’s latest Vanguard update targeted advanced DMA cheat hardware, prompting claims that some cheat setups were “bricked.” Riot clarified the system does not damage legitimate PCs, but the move highlights its ongoing anti-cheat escalation in Valorant.

items.title: Helldivers 2 to get Warhammer 40,000 crossover Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 is set for a Warhammer 40,000 crossover Warbond, adding another major licensed collaboration to the game’s post-launch roadmap. The announcement is one of the biggest live-service updates mentioned in the past 24 hours.

items.title: Neverness to Everness expands to Steam and Epic Games Store with cross-play and cross-progression
items.summary: Neverness to Everness is moving onto Steam and the Epic Games Store, with support for cross-play and cross-progression. The wider platform rollout suggests the game is pushing toward a broader PC audience ahead of launch.

items.title: Arknights Endfield prepares ‘Sketches of Lost Heirlooms’ update
items.summary: Arknights Endfield is gearing up for its “Sketches of Lost Heirlooms” update, which will add new system and content changes. The update was highlighted as one of the notable upcoming game developments from the last day.

items.title: Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.3 set for release with new story, characters, and events
items.summary: Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.3 is scheduled to launch with new story content, characters, and events. It stands out as one of the biggest content drops mentioned in the recent gaming roundup.

items.title: Red Dead Redemption 2 climbs to third on all-time sales rankings
items.summary: Red Dead Redemption 2 has reportedly surpassed Wii Sports to become the third best-selling game ever, with sales reaching around 85 million copies as of early 2026. The milestone underscores the game’s long-tail commercial success.

items.title: Overwatch marks 10-year anniversary
items.summary: Overwatch is being noted for reaching its 10-year anniversary since launch. The milestone is a reminder of the franchise’s long influence on hero shooters and live-service multiplayer games.

items.title: AYANEO reveals compact Android handheld under KONKR sub-brand
items.summary: AYANEO has unveiled a compact Android handheld under its KONKR sub-brand, featuring integrated AI-related functions. The device adds to the growing wave of gaming handheld announcements in the portable hardware market.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple preparing new ‘Gen AI’ website ahead of WWDC
items.summary: Apple is reportedly getting a new generative AI marketing site ready ahead of its upcoming WWDC keynote, signaling that AI will be a major theme at the event. The move suggests Apple is continuing to build out its broader software and services messaging before the conference.

items.title: Apple registers new ‘gen AI’ subdomain ahead of next month’s WWDC keynote
items.summary: Apple has reportedly registered a new “gen AI” subdomain, a sign that the company is preparing additional web infrastructure for its WWDC announcements. The development points to fresh product and platform updates tied to Apple’s software strategy.

items.title: iPhone 18 series case leaks suggest familiar design with a larger camera bump
items.summary: New case leaks appear to show the iPhone 18 lineup keeping a familiar overall look while potentially adding a bulkier camera area. The report adds to early speculation about Apple’s next hardware cycle.

items.title: iOS 27 rumored to bring redesigned Camera interface and updated Photos app
items.summary: Early reports suggest Apple is planning interface changes for the Camera and Photos apps in iOS 27. If accurate, the update would focus on usability and visual refinements rather than a broad redesign.

items.title: Indie app ‘Poppy’ aims to handle tasks Siri still can’t
items.summary: A new indie app spotlight highlights Poppy, a proactive assistant designed to automate tasks that voice assistants like Siri still struggle with. The app reflects continued momentum in consumer productivity tools built for mobile devices.
